Committee: Cultural Affairs, Tourism, Parks And Recreation

Milestones.Committee: Cultural Affairs, Tourism, Parks And Recreation

Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CULTURAL AFFAIRS, TOURISM, PARKS AND RECREATION

Title: Authorizes the council on the arts to designate Little Panama as a cultural district
Summary: Authorizes the council on the arts to designate Little Panama as a cultural district in the city of New York; designates boundaries.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the arts and cultural affairs law, in relation to authorizing the council on the arts to designate Little Panama as a cultural district
